Email Marketing Agent.action: Scrapes current R1 Concepts brake parts catalog, promotions, and product details to use as email content source material.
Email Marketing Agent.impact: Ensures every marketing email features accurate, up-to-date product information and pricing without manual catalog lookups.

Email Marketing Agent.action: Generates a complete daily marketing email — subject line, body copy, and CTAs — tailored to R1 Concepts branding and current product data.
Email Marketing Agent.impact: Eliminates hours of daily copywriting effort while producing consistently on-brand, engaging email content that drives click-through rates.

Email Marketing Agent.action: Publishes the AI-generated email via HubSpot Marketing Email API and sends it to targeted contact lists on a daily schedule.
Email Marketing Agent.impact: Automates the full send pipeline so the marketing team maintains daily customer touchpoints without manual campaign setup.

DFC Email Marketing Agent.action: Pulls current Dynamic Friction Company product listings, promotional offers, and brand messaging from the DFC website.
DFC Email Marketing Agent.impact: Guarantees email content reflects the latest DFC inventory and promotions without manual content gathering from the product team.

DFC Email Marketing Agent.action: Generates a daily marketing email with DFC-specific branding, product recommendations, and compelling sales copy.
DFC Email Marketing Agent.impact: Produces professional, conversion-optimized email content daily, freeing the marketing team to focus on strategy rather than writing.

DFC Email Marketing Agent.action: Creates and sends the AI-generated marketing email to DFC contact lists via the HubSpot Marketing Email API.
DFC Email Marketing Agent.impact: Maintains consistent daily outreach to DFC customers with zero manual campaign configuration or scheduling required.

R1 Support Agent.action: Retrieves incoming support tickets from HubSpot including customer details, issue descriptions, and order history.
R1 Support Agent.impact: Centralizes all support context in one pull so the AI can respond with full customer awareness instead of starting from scratch.

R1 Support Agent.action: Classifies each ticket by issue type and urgency, then drafts a context-aware reply for the R1 support team to review.
R1 Support Agent.impact: Reduces average ticket response time dramatically by pre-classifying issues and generating accurate draft replies for agent approval.

R1 Support Agent.action: Updates the ticket with the AI-generated classification, tags, and draft reply so the support team can review and send.
R1 Support Agent.impact: Support reps spend seconds reviewing and approving responses instead of minutes researching and writing each one from scratch.

Customer Issues Analyzer.action: Pulls Amazon in-box flyer return and issue form submissions that customers have submitted through HubSpot.
Customer Issues Analyzer.impact: Captures every customer-reported product issue and return reason systematically, preventing any feedback from being lost or overlooked.

Customer Issues Analyzer.action: Syncs all extracted return and issue data into a structured Google Sheet for team-wide analysis and trend tracking.
Customer Issues Analyzer.impact: Gives the operations team a real-time, filterable view of product issues and return patterns to drive quality improvements and reduce return rates.

DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.action: Monitors HubSpot for DFC customer activity signals such as website visits, page views, and engagement events on the R1 website.
DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.impact: Identifies high-intent DFC customers the moment they show buying signals, enabling the sales team to strike while interest is hot.

DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.action: Sends real-time alerts to the DFC sales team via Microsoft Teams messages and email with customer activity details and context.
DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.impact: Sales reps receive instant notifications about active customers so they can follow up within minutes instead of discovering activity days later.

R1 Customer Agent.action: Will serve as a customer-facing AI agent on R1 Concepts digital properties to handle inquiries, product questions, and order support.
R1 Customer Agent.impact: Once deployed, will provide 24/7 instant customer support, reducing wait times and freeing the human support team for complex escalations.

Creator Discovery Tool.action: Searches the web using targeted keywords to discover potential content creators across blogs, social profiles, and media mentions.
Creator Discovery Tool.impact: Casts a wide net across the internet to surface creator candidates that wouldn't appear through platform-only searches.

Creator Discovery Tool.platform: YouTube API / Instagram Looter API / Google API
Creator Discovery Tool.action: Pulls detailed creator profiles, follower counts, engagement metrics, and content history from YouTube, Instagram, and Google results.
Creator Discovery Tool.impact: Builds rich creator profiles with real performance data so the team evaluates creators based on metrics, not guesswork.

Creator Discovery Tool.action: Analyzes and ranks discovered creators by relevance, audience fit, and content alignment using AI-powered keyword and profile analysis.
Creator Discovery Tool.impact: Reduces hours of manual creator research into seconds by intelligently filtering and prioritizing the best-fit creators for outreach.

Creator Qualifier.action: Scores discovered creators against customizable weighted criteria such as engagement rate, audience size, niche relevance, and content quality.
Creator Qualifier.impact: Ensures the outreach team only pursues creators who meet specific partnership thresholds, maximizing ROI on influencer spend and outreach effort.

Creator Outreach.action: Retrieves learned outreach sequences, email templates, and prompt configurations stored in Google Drive for campaign use.
Creator Outreach.impact: Ensures outreach follows proven messaging frameworks and brand guidelines that have been refined over previous campaigns.

Creator Outreach.action: Generates personalized outreach emails for each qualified creator using learned sequences and creator-specific context.
Creator Outreach.impact: Produces tailored, high-response-rate outreach at scale without the team having to manually write individual emails for each creator.

Creator Outreach.action: Sends the AI-generated personalized outreach emails directly to qualified creators via Gmail.
Creator Outreach.impact: Automates the entire outreach send process, enabling the team to contact dozens of creators daily without manual email composition.

Creator Reponse.action: Monitors Gmail inbox for creator replies and pulls in the full conversation thread for AI analysis.
Creator Reponse.impact: Ensures no creator response is missed and every reply is processed promptly, maintaining momentum in partnership negotiations.

Creator Reponse.action: Retrieves historical influencer email conversations and negotiation patterns from Google Drive to inform AI response generation.
Creator Reponse.impact: Leverages institutional knowledge from past successful negotiations so the AI responds with proven strategies and appropriate terms.

Creator Reponse.action: Generates context-aware reply emails using learned negotiation tactics, conversation history, and creator-specific deal parameters.
Creator Reponse.impact: Handles ongoing creator negotiations intelligently and at scale, maintaining professional and strategic conversations without constant human drafting.

MHM Load Sheet Automation.action: Pulls MHM vehicle data and the New Availability Guide to match vehicle part numbers against current inventory availability.
MHM Load Sheet Automation.impact: Eliminates hours of manual cross-referencing between vehicle lists and availability data, ensuring load sheets are always accurate and up-to-date.

MHM Load Sheet Automation.action: Monitors Teams channels for updated source files or notifications triggering the weekly load sheet generation cycle.
MHM Load Sheet Automation.impact: Ensures the automation stays in sync with the latest team inputs without requiring manual file handoffs or reminders.

MHM Load Sheet Automation.action: Creates and sends the Must Have Monday email with the formatted load sheet and accompanying sales sheet attached.
MHM Load Sheet Automation.impact: Delivers consistent weekly MHM emails to the distribution list on schedule, driving dealer engagement and eliminating manual email assembly.

First to Market Email Automation.action: Generates email copy for First to Market product launch announcements and monthly recap emails using product details and launch context.
First to Market Email Automation.impact: Produces polished, on-brand email copy in seconds, freeing the marketing team from writing repetitive launch and recap emails from scratch.

First to Market Email Automation.action: Creates email drafts in HubSpot with the AI-generated copy, attaches sales sheets, and stages them for review and send.
First to Market Email Automation.impact: Reduces email production time from hours to minutes and ensures every new product launch gets a consistent, professional email draft ready for approval.

Marketing Deck Automation.action: Extracts lifecycle reporting metrics including lead counts, conversion rates, and email performance data for the reporting period.
Marketing Deck Automation.impact: Automatically gathers CRM performance data that would otherwise require manual exports and pivot table work each month.

Marketing Deck Automation.action: Pulls website traffic, session data, and user behavior metrics from Google Analytics 4 and Search Console for organic performance reporting.
Marketing Deck Automation.impact: Consolidates web analytics and search visibility data automatically, eliminating manual screenshot-and-paste reporting workflows.

Marketing Deck Automation.action: Retrieves SMS campaign performance metrics including send volumes, click rates, and revenue attribution for the month.
Marketing Deck Automation.impact: Ensures SMS channel performance is accurately represented alongside other marketing channels without manual data pulls.

Marketing Deck Automation.action: Populates slides 48-55 of the Marketing Highlights deck with formatted metrics, charts, and data from all collected sources.
Marketing Deck Automation.impact: Transforms what was a tedious multi-hour monthly slide-building task into an automated process, ensuring consistent formatting and accurate data every month.

R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.action: Analyzes keyword performance and identifies keyword gaps where R1 Concepts trails competitors in search rankings.
R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.impact: Pinpoints high-value keyword opportunities that competitors are capturing, enabling data-driven content targeting instead of guesswork.

R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.action: Generates SEO-optimized blog articles targeting the identified keyword gaps, including meta descriptions, headers, and internal linking suggestions.
R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.impact: Produces publication-ready blog content at scale, enabling consistent content velocity that would otherwise require dedicated copywriters.

R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.action: Publishes the generated blog posts to the R1 Concepts WordPress site with Yoast SEO optimization settings configured for each article.
R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.impact: Automates the entire publish workflow including SEO metadata, ensuring every post is fully optimized from the moment it goes live.

Shirly PO Workflow Automation.action: Processes vendor purchase order exports from Dream ERP, extracting PO details including vendor names, order amounts, due dates, and fulfillment status.
Shirly PO Workflow Automation.impact: Eliminates manual data extraction and reformatting from ERP exports, ensuring no vendor POs fall through the cracks in the follow-up process.

Shirly PO Workflow Automation.action: Transforms and uploads the PO data into HubSpot, creating or updating contact records and triggering automated vendor chase email sequences.
Shirly PO Workflow Automation.impact: Automates the entire vendor follow-up workflow so overdue POs get timely chase emails, improving vendor accountability and reducing fulfillment delays.

DFC Load Sheet Generator.action: Accepts MHM vehicle part number uploads and the New Availability Guide, matches records against each other, and highlights available inventory.
DFC Load Sheet Generator.impact: Gives any team member instant access to load sheet generation without needing technical skills or server access—just open the browser and upload files.

DFC Load Sheet Generator.action: Exports the matched and formatted data as a DFC load sheet Excel file ready for distribution.

MHM Attentive SMS Automation.action: Uses Chrome browser automation to log into Attentive, clone the previous week's MHM SMS campaign, and prepare it as a template for the new week.
MHM Attentive SMS Automation.impact: Eliminates repetitive manual campaign cloning steps in the Attentive UI, saving time and reducing the risk of configuration errors each week.

MHM Attentive SMS Automation.impact: Ensures weekly MHM SMS campaigns go out consistently with accurate vehicle details and proper timing, maintaining subscriber engagement without manual oversight.

DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.action: Extracts comprehensive sales transaction data including customer purchase history, product categories, order frequency, and revenue figures.
DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.impact: Unlocks deep customer and product insights from raw ERP data that would otherwise sit unused or require manual analysis.

DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.action: Segments customers into reorder, cross-sell, and win-back cohorts, then triggers corresponding automated email campaigns with personalized product recommendations.
DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.impact: Drives incremental revenue through timely, data-driven outreach—reorder reminders prevent churn, cross-sell emails increase AOV, and win-back campaigns recover lapsed customers.

DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.action: Sends targeted SMS campaigns to segmented customer groups based on the sales analysis, reinforcing email outreach through a secondary channel.

Super Session Saturday Automation.action: Monitors a designated Teams channel for new Excel file uploads from William Nguyen, triggering the weekly automation when a file is detected.
Super Session Saturday Automation.impact: Eliminates the need for manual handoffs or calendar reminders—the automation self-triggers the moment the source file is available.

Super Session Saturday Automation.action: Uploads the new Excel file to HubSpot File Manager and generates a fresh download link to embed in the email.
Super Session Saturday Automation.impact: Ensures recipients always get the latest session file with a working download link, preventing broken links or outdated attachments.

Super Session Saturday Automation.action: Clones the previous Super Session Saturday email, swaps in the new download link, and schedules it to send Saturday at 8AM.
Super Session Saturday Automation.impact: Delivers a consistent weekly email experience with zero manual intervention, ensuring the Super Session Saturday email never misses its Saturday 8AM send window.

DFC SEO Blog System.action: Generates B2B-focused SEO blog content targeting shops, distributors, and fleet operators with industry-specific language and keyword targeting.

DFC SEO Blog System.action: Publishes the AI-generated blog posts to the DFC WordPress site with proper formatting, categories, and SEO metadata configured.

Friction Friday Automation.action: Pulls the latest Friction Friday video URL, title, thumbnail, and transcript each week.
Friction Friday Automation.impact: Eliminates manual video tracking so the marketing team never misses a publish date. Saves ~30 minutes of weekly coordination.

Friction Friday Automation.action: Auto-generates and publishes a blog post embedding the video with SEO-optimized copy derived from the transcript.
Friction Friday Automation.impact: Drives organic search traffic from every video without requiring a content writer to manually create each post. Ensures consistent weekly publishing cadence.

Friction Friday Automation.action: Sends a branded weekly email to the DFC subscriber list featuring the new video and blog post link.
Friction Friday Automation.impact: Keeps the DFC audience engaged with zero manual email creation, increasing video views and blog traffic directly from the subscriber base.

Friction Friday Automation.action: Fires an SMS notification to opted-in contacts with a short message and direct video or blog link.

R1 HubSpot Workflow Optimization.action: Audits all existing R1 Concepts workflows including site-visit triggers, welcome series, and enrollment criteria for gaps and redundancies.
R1 HubSpot Workflow Optimization.impact: Identifies broken or underperforming automations that may be leaking leads or sending duplicate emails, protecting brand reputation and conversion rates.

R1 HubSpot Workflow Optimization.action: Restructures and optimizes workflow logic — refining site-visit triggers, updating welcome series timing, and cleaning enrollment rules.
R1 HubSpot Workflow Optimization.impact: Delivers higher open and conversion rates through properly sequenced nurture flows, ensuring new R1 contacts receive the right message at the right time.

DFC HubSpot Data Setup.action: Extracts Dream CustomerIDs and associated contact details from the ERP database for mapping.

DFC HubSpot Data Setup.impact: Enables DFC sales workflows to trigger based on ERP data — such as order history or account tier — unlocking personalized automation at scale.

Bomb File Project.action: Scoping project requirements, identifying data sources, and defining deliverables for the bomb file initiative.

Image Mapping Project for Dream.action: Planning the schema and logic to map product images to their corresponding records within the Dream ERP system.

Claudia Automation.action: Defining the scope, triggers, and integration points for the Claudia automation project.

Shirly Invoice PDF Automation.action: Scoping the automated generation and delivery pipeline for Shirly invoice PDFs, including data sources and output format.
Shirly Invoice PDF Automation.impact: Prepares for hands-free invoice creation that will save hours of manual PDF formatting and reduce billing errors.

R1 YouTube Weekly Automation.action: Detects and retrieves the latest weekly R1 Concepts video including URL, title, description, and transcript.

R1 YouTube Weekly Automation.action: Creates and publishes a blog post with the embedded R1 video and AI-assisted copy from the transcript.

R1 YouTube Weekly Automation.action: Triggers a branded weekly email to the R1 subscriber segment with the video highlight and blog link.

Weekly Checkup Bot.action: Pulls the current week's performance metrics from Meta, TikTok, and Google Ads including spend, ROAS, impressions, and conversions.
Weekly Checkup Bot.impact: Aggregates cross-platform data in seconds instead of requiring an analyst to log into three dashboards and manually export reports.

Weekly Checkup Bot.action: Compares this week's metrics against the previous month's averages and generates a plain-English summary highlighting anomalies and trends.
Weekly Checkup Bot.impact: Delivers analyst-grade insights automatically, flagging underperforming channels early so the team can intervene before budgets are wasted.

Weekly Checkup Bot.action: Emails the formatted weekly checkup report to the marketing team with key metrics and AI-generated commentary.

Monthly Report Bot.action: Extracts full-month performance data from Meta, TikTok, and Google Ads including spend totals, ROAS, conversions, and audience metrics.
Monthly Report Bot.impact: Eliminates hours of manual data pulling and spreadsheet consolidation at month-end, freeing the team to focus on strategy instead of data wrangling.

Monthly Report Bot.action: Analyzes the monthly data and formats it into a structured summary designed to slot directly into end-of-month presentation slides.
Monthly Report Bot.impact: Produces presentation-ready insights with consistent formatting, reducing report prep time from hours to minutes and ensuring data accuracy.

Monthly Report Bot.action: Delivers the formatted monthly report to stakeholders via email, ready to be pasted into the end-of-month slide deck.
Monthly Report Bot.impact: Stakeholders receive a polished, consistent report on schedule every month with zero manual formatting — accelerating the review meeting prep process.

Amazon Flyer -> Meta Audience Sync.action: Captures customers who completed the Amazon flyer warranty registration form and exports their contact data.
Amazon Flyer -> Meta Audience Sync.impact: Ensures every warranty registrant is automatically identified and queued for retargeting, eliminating manual list pulls and reducing audience lag time.

Amazon Flyer -> Meta Audience Sync.action: Validates, deduplicates, and formats the customer records to match Meta's Custom Audience upload requirements.
Amazon Flyer -> Meta Audience Sync.impact: Prevents rejected uploads and duplicate audience entries, ensuring clean and accurate audience segments every time.

Amazon Flyer -> Meta Audience Sync.action: Syncs the processed customer list into a Meta Custom Audience for retargeting campaigns.
Amazon Flyer -> Meta Audience Sync.impact: Warranty registrants are automatically retargeted with relevant ads, increasing repeat purchase rates and lifetime value without any manual audience management.

Paid Social Copy Audit.action: Pulls performance metrics and ad copy from all active paid social campaigns across Meta and TikTok.
Paid Social Copy Audit.impact: Centralizes ad performance data from multiple platforms in one place, saving hours of manual cross-platform reporting.

Paid Social Copy Audit.action: Analyzes ad copy against performance benchmarks, identifies underperforming creatives, and generates specific copy improvement recommendations.
Paid Social Copy Audit.impact: Surfaces actionable optimization insights that would take a strategist hours to compile, accelerating the creative iteration cycle.

Paid Social Copy Audit.action: Sends a formatted audit report with flagged ads and recommended copy improvements to the paid social team.
Paid Social Copy Audit.impact: Delivers a ready-to-act optimization brief directly to stakeholders' inboxes, ensuring underperforming ads are addressed quickly.

Asana Agent.action: Retrieves tasks, due dates, assignees, and status updates from relevant Asana projects.
Asana Agent.impact: Automatically gathers project status data without requiring team members to manually compile updates or check boards.

Asana Agent.action: Summarizes task progress, highlights overdue or at-risk items, and formats the information into a clear status update.

Asana Agent.action: Sends the formatted project status summary to relevant stakeholders via email.
Asana Agent.impact: Keeps the team informed on project health without anyone needing to log into Asana, improving visibility and accountability.

Media Meeting Task Agent.action: Captures meeting transcripts and notes from media team meetings held in Teams.
Media Meeting Task Agent.impact: Ensures no action items or decisions are lost after meetings, replacing the need for someone to manually take and distribute notes.

Media Meeting Task Agent.action: Receives or forwards the meeting transcript and any supplementary notes for AI processing.
Media Meeting Task Agent.impact: Creates a reliable handoff point that captures meeting content in a structured format for downstream task extraction.

Media Meeting Task Agent.action: Extracts action items, assigns owners, sets due dates, and formats tasks from the meeting content.
Media Meeting Task Agent.impact: Converts unstructured meeting discussions into clearly defined tasks in seconds, eliminating the manual effort of parsing notes and assigning follow-ups.

Media Meeting Task Agent.action: Creates tasks in Asana with the extracted action items, assignees, and due dates from the meeting.
Media Meeting Task Agent.impact: Meeting follow-ups are automatically tracked in the team's project management system, ensuring accountability and nothing falls through the cracks.

Google Ads Copy Audit.action: Pulls search ad copy, headlines, descriptions, and performance metrics from active Google Ads campaigns.

Google Ads Copy Audit.action: Evaluates ad copy effectiveness against performance benchmarks, identifies weak performers, and generates specific rewrite recommendations.

Google Ads Copy Audit.action: Sends a detailed audit report with flagged ads and recommended copy changes to the search ads team.
Google Ads Copy Audit.impact: Delivers a clear, prioritized action plan that enables faster ad optimization and improved Quality Scores without manual analysis.

Agent Tracker Agent.action: Reads the latest data from the Agent Tracker spreadsheet, including agent statuses, metrics, and update logs.
Agent Tracker Agent.impact: Automatically pulls the most current agent tracking data without anyone needing to manually copy or summarize the sheet.

Agent Tracker Agent.action: Formats the raw spreadsheet data into a clean, easy-to-read weekly summary with highlights and key changes.
Agent Tracker Agent.impact: Transforms a dense spreadsheet into a scannable executive update, saving stakeholders from digging through rows and columns.

Agent Tracker Agent.action: Sends the formatted weekly Agent Tracker update to the distribution list.
Agent Tracker Agent.impact: Keeps all stakeholders informed on agent progress with a consistent, professional weekly digest delivered automatically.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Mark submits a vehicle specification (make, model, year, etc.) through a HubSpot form to initiate the catalog request.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Provides a simple, standardized intake process that triggers the entire workflow without needing to email or message anyone.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Queries the DFC product catalog and Dream inventory system to identify what parts are stocked for the specified vehicles and what gaps exist.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Instantly cross-references inventory against vehicle fitment data, replacing hours of manual catalog lookups across multiple systems.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Formats the matched and missing inventory data into a clean, structured Excel-ready output organized by vehicle and part category.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Produces a professional, ready-to-use catalog document in seconds that would previously take significant manual formatting effort.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Emails the formatted Excel file to Mark with a summary of stocked parts and inventory gaps for the requested vehicles.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Delivers a complete, actionable catalog directly to Mark's inbox, enabling faster special markets decision-making without any manual assembly.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Ingests the weekly backorder report and queries Dream for live inventory status including on-hand, on-order, and in-transit quantities for each part.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Consolidates inventory lookups that previously required a dozen people doing independent searches into a single automated data pull.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Enriches the backorder report with live inventory statuses, flags parts with no available source, and drafts customer communication templates for each order scenario.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Replaces hours of manual enrichment and email drafting across multiple team members, ensuring consistent and accurate customer communications.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Sends the enriched backorder report and draft customer communications to the team for review and distribution.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Enables rapid customer follow-up with pre-drafted, situation-specific messages, dramatically reducing response time on backorder inquiries.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Scrapes Gyro Disc, Alcon, and Brembo's online catalogs to extract two-piece rotor fitment data by make, model, and year.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Automates competitive catalog research that would take days of manual browsing, ensuring comprehensive market coverage.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Cross-references the scraped competitor rotor data against DFC's existing parts catalog to identify overlaps and gaps.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Reveals exactly where DFC has competitive coverage and where market opportunities exist, informing inventory and sourcing decisions.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Sends automated customer outreach emails to gather demand data on two-piece rotors for specific vehicle applications.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Collects real market demand signals directly from customers, validating which gaps are worth filling before committing to inventory.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Compiles all scraped data, cross-references, and customer demand responses into one formatted reference sheet for Dino.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Delivers a single, comprehensive output that combines competitive intelligence and demand data, enabling faster product line decisions.

Meta Investigation.action: Scans all active ad copy across Meta and TikTok campaigns for specific flagged phrases on demand.
Meta Investigation.impact: Enables instant compliance and brand safety checks across all live ads without manually reviewing each campaign.

Meta Investigation.action: Searches all ad copy for the specified phrases, identifies exact matches, and logs the specific field and full copy where each match was found.
Meta Investigation.impact: Pinpoints exact violations or flagged language across hundreds of ads in seconds, eliminating the risk of missed matches in manual reviews.

Meta Investigation.action: Emails a flagged list showing each match with the exact ad, field, and copy where the specified phrases were found.
Meta Investigation.impact: Delivers an actionable audit trail that lets the team immediately address flagged copy, reducing compliance risk and speeding up corrections.
